title: Conditional opinion
subtitle: Use it depends on.
overview: Module: Opinions and Reasoning. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: Many real opinions depend on the person, goal, or situation.
很多真实观点取决于人、目标或情况。
Useful frame: state the point, support it, add balance, and finish with a clear conclusion.
实用框架：说出观点、支撑观点、加入平衡、用清楚结论收尾。
Give an opinion that depends on the situation.
给出一个取决于情况的观点。
It depends on your goal. If you want to travel, useful phrases are enough at first. But if you want to work in English, you need clearer writing and longer speaking practice.
这取决于你的目标。如果你想旅行，有用短语一开始就够了。但如果你想用英语工作，你需要更清楚的写作和更长的口语练习。

items.en: Many real opinions depend on the person, goal, or situation.
items.zh: 很多真实观点取决于人、目标或情况。

items.en: Useful frame: state the point, support it, add balance, and finish with a clear conclusion.
items.zh: 实用框架：说出观点、支撑观点、加入平衡、用清楚结论收尾。

items.en: It depends on your goal. If you want to travel, useful phrases are enough at first. But if you want to work in English, you need clearer writing and longer speaking practice.
items.zh: 这取决于你的目标。如果你想旅行，有用短语一开始就够了。但如果你想用英语工作，你需要更清楚的写作和更长的口语练习。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Give an opinion that depends on the situation.
lines.zh: 给出一个取决于情况的观点。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It depends on your goal. If you want to travel, useful phrases are enough at first. But if you want to work in English, you need clearer writing and longer speaking practice.
lines.zh: 这取决于你的目标。如果你想旅行，有用短语一开始就够了。但如果你想用英语工作，你需要更清楚的写作和更长的口语练习。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Give an opinion that depends on the situation.
items.zh: 给出一个取决于情况的观点。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
